name: Cocoa Mix
recipeIngredient: Large package chocolate instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a covered container and store at room temperature.
To serve:
1. Dissolve 2 tablespoons of the cocoa mix in 1 cup boiling water.
2. Stir until fully dissolved and serve immediately.
Yield: 50 servings
